rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2001.143, which governs timing of decisions in contested case hearings. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A decision or order that may become final under Section 2001.144 in a contested case should be signed not later than the 60th day after the date on which the hearing is finally closed.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns administrative contested-case timing, not property tax exemptions.
